body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->

This pull request updates the parameter creation logic in `src/parameters/create_parameters.jl` to optimize how microphysics parameters are loaded based on configuration arguments. The main improvement is that only the relevant microphysics parameter set is instantiated, reducing memory usage and improving efficiency.

Parameter loading optimization:

* The `ClimaAtmosParameters` function now accepts an optional `parsed_args` argument, allowing it to determine which microphysics model is in use and instantiate only the corresponding parameter set. (`src/parameters/create_parameters.jl`, [src/parameters/create_parameters.jlL18-R26](diffhunk://#diff-a9dec5e0780f17cbff9d5838bf3ef2feefae3ac2951e658359ce3581b8f00c54L18-R26))
* If `parsed_args` is provided, the function checks which microphysics model is selected and sets unused parameter sets (`microphysics_0m_params`, `microphysics_1m_params`, `microphysics_2m_params`) to `nothing`, ensuring only necessary parameters are loaded. (`src/parameters/create_parameters.jl`, [src/parameters/create_parameters.jlR57-R65](diffhunk://#diff-a9dec5e0780f17cbff9d5838bf3ef2feefae3ac2951e658359ce3581b8f00c54R57-R65))


This pull request is an attempt to resolve GPU kernel parameter memory issues, ref slack discussion [here](https://climate-machine.slack.com/archives/C0102PWRSGJ/p1755712606324659)

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

title: rft: conditionally load microphysics parameters
